textBox.richText: “Allow me to break da ice”. This is intended to be a private blog(lol privacy in the modern world), however it is currently being hosted under my main server(this is going to end well, but thats what I get for being cheap and only keeping one server up and running 24/7. Back to business: this blog will probably die a cold death like the “others” so don’t expect me to keep a perfect primary source quality record. It is not gonna happen. //init ranting.framework print col1 ”in this world we live in the amount of ignorance is to damn high” print col2 “Why do wars start” //suspend ranting.framework Also I still use iWeb, Deal with it. this website will hopefully improve what limited writing skills I have as well as provide an outlet for a LOT of built up STRESS. thanks, and as always have nice day. DUCES <!--End Blog Post-->
